headerTitle: Director, Applied AI  ·  Greenfield AI Platform Build  ·  Agentic Systems  ·  Enterprise AI Transformation
subjectText: Director, Applied AI — DSV (Austin, TX Remote) · $175K–$250K
intro: DSV is building its North American AI capability from the ground up — a greenfield charter to architect and ship AI agents and integrated workflows against real operational data. That is the exact build pattern across four external client engagements: no inherited AI infrastructure, no existing playbook, just discovery, design, and production deployment.
bullets: Greenfield AI capability build — four complete cycles from discovery to production: identified highest-leverage operational problems, scoped in ROI terms, shipped the working system. No existing AI infrastructure inherited on any engagement.

Agentic AI system design and build — 14 live endpoints using Claude (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus) with tool-use patterns, MCP protocol, HITL confirm-before-execute, and Zod-validated output. Opinions on agent contract design: input/output schemas, memory strategies, fallback behaviors.

Business case and ROI translation — former GM with P&L ownership translated operational friction into approved AI investments across six engagements. Scoped in throughput and cost terms that executive sponsors can act on.
closingLine: The greenfield charter at DSV — identify, build, and operationalize AI systems against real operational data across a complex enterprise — is the pattern I have run four times with measurable outcomes. I would welcome a conversation about where the North America AI build is headed.
matchNotes: Honest stretch: 10+ yrs requirement, 5 yrs AI/ML production, Director-level mgmt experience, Azure/MS ecosystem depth, MLOps (PyTorch/HuggingFace/fine-tuning) all gaps. Strengths: greenfield builder pattern (4x), Anthropic/MCP/agentic in production, exec advisory range (GM background), Python + TypeScript, Dallas TX local. $175-250K ceiling is exceptional. Apply because Anthropic-native + TX + greenfield charter is rare.
